# KSAN package

- `statement.md`: de bai
- `config.yaml`: gioi han chay
- `solution.cpp`: loi giai mau
- `ksan01.in` ... `ksan25.in`: 25 bo test
- `ksan01.out` ... `ksan25.out`: dap an tuong ung

Chay lai generator:

```powershell
cd C:\DATN\test\Hydro-master\examples\testdata\KSAN
python gen_tests.py
```
